products.name: PE 505
products.shortDescription: PTFE compression packing for pumps and valves
products.description: PE 505 is a high-performance PTFE packing suitable for various industrial applications including pumps, valves, and rotating equipment.

technicalData.Construction: Pure PTFE filament yarn with PTFE impregnation

features: Excellent chemical resistance across full pH range
Low friction coefficient for reduced wear
Suitable for food and pharmaceutical applications

products.description: PE 504 offers reliable PTFE sealing for general purpose applications with excellent chemical resistance and wide temperature range.

features: Universal chemical resistance across full pH spectrum
Low coefficient of friction for extended service life

products.name: HY 504

Extended temperature range for versatile applications
Good chemical compatibility in most services
Reduced break-in time and easy installation
